hero.title: Seamless API Integration
hero.description: The success of our partnership hinges on the speed of implementation. Our solution is designed as a low-code, plug-and-play service, ensuring minimal strain on your internal development resources and a rapid time-to-market.

pillars.title: The Three Integration Pillars
pillars.description: Our service connects to your platform via a secure RESTful API, enabling automatic data flow and minimizing manual intervention. The integration requires focusing only on three core data exchange points:

items.title: Customer Onboarding Hook
items.description: A simple click to activate the VAT reclaim service for a specific business customer.

items.title: Transaction Data Feed
items.description: A secure feed of relevant foreign expense transactions.

items.title: Approval, Status & Payout
items.description: A webhook to receive notifications on approvals, real-time updates on claim status and final refund payments.

lowCode.title: Low Code, High Value
lowCode.description: We understand that speed and efficiency are paramount. We deliver:

items.title: Robust Documentation
items.description: Comprehensive, easy-to-follow API documentation and SDKs for popular languages to accelerate your development cycle.

items.title: Dedicated Sandbox Environment
items.description: A fully functional testing environment allows your team to prototype and validate the integration without affecting live production.

items.title: Minimal Maintenance
items.description: We handle all ongoing compliance updates, foreign tax authority changes, and system maintenance. Zero technical debt for your platform.

timeline.title: Time-to-Market Estimate
timeline.description: We project a rapid implementation timeline, allowing you to launch this new premium feature quickly:

cta.title: Ready to Start Integration?
cta.buttonText: Request a Live Demo & Partnership Consultation
